chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1180 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7382/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.4724/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Mumtaz Ali Jehangir Lashari, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the material available on record. The record reflects that, through the present petition, the petitioner seeks directions against private respondents, which do not fall within the domain of the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. Accordingly, the present petition, being not maintainable, stands dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
